title: Super Mario Mania
description: Items, mobs, blocks and abilities from Super Mario games in Minecraft!
body:
![Super Mario Mania logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/568cc95f783e382794066079549802025bb52321.png)

### THE MOD IS NOT ABANDONED! If it is I'll change this message, but I'm not going to abandon it anytime soon.

The purpose of the mod is to add different blocks, items, mobs and mechanics from the Super Mario games. Most content of the mod can be found in a new dimension.

The mod can be useful both for players who are hungry for adventure, since the new world has a lot of dangerous and interesting things, and for builders who can use blocks, decorations, mobs and items in maps to make their own Mario game!

All blocks, characters, etc. belong to Nintendo.

![Story](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08a1db5cc72b2a5fb586fe35f87e73e2a614a409.png)

First of all you need to find a **Warp Pipe** in the overworld or craft **Awakened nether star** by combining nether star and totem of undying. These objects can teleport you into the 1st World of Mushroom Kingdom. 

You'll be greeted by **Captain Toad**, who serves as a small tutorial. He'll also give you new armor and the Royal Compass, which leads you to the **Peach's Castle**, your first objective. In the castle you can find **Paintings** that you can use to go back to the overworld or new worlds of mod (they aren't added yet) and Eternal Star pedestal. It transform coins into the XP.

Next your task is to collect **Power Stars** by exploring the world, fighting bosses and helping NPCs.

Their main usage is activating **structures that ominously pulsate**. One of them is **Larry's citadel**. You have to defeat him to go to the **next world** (which isn't added yet)

![Citadel generator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7cfbc4b9e21f016374b134d484f69dc5d96f34e_0.webp)




![new moveset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e608679de5aacf942f4ff1d33f09abfa4915ecf.png)

![Hanging on ledges](https://file.garden/ZmGfCCOgiFXI9ZXM/Mario%20Mania/move_ledgehanging.gif)

You can **Hang on ledges**! [fall near the ledge and look towards it. Space to climb on it]

![Wall jumps](https://file.garden/ZmGfCCOgiFXI9ZXM/Mario%20Mania/move_walljump.gif)

And make **Walljumps**! [space in the air near the wall]

![Ground pound](https://file.garden/ZmGfCCOgiFXI9ZXM/Mario%20Mania/move_pound.gif)

Or even crush blocks and foes with **Ground Pound**! [shift in the air]

![Backflip](https://file.garden/ZmGfCCOgiFXI9ZXM/Mario%20Mania/move_flip.gif)

You can do a **Backflip**! [press shift while standing and jump]

![Land jump](https://file.garden/ZmGfCCOgiFXI9ZXM/Mario%20Mania/move_landjump.gif)

**Land Jump**! [Jump after the ground pound]

![Long jump](https://file.garden/ZmGfCCOgiFXI9ZXM/Mario%20Mania/move_long_jump.gif)

Make **Long Jump**! [crouch while running and jump]

![Triple jump](https://file.garden/ZmGfCCOgiFXI9ZXM/Mario%20Mania/move_triple_jump.gif)

Make the highest **Triple Jump**! [just three jumps. Don't hold the space, you should press it just after landing]

![Twirl](https://file.garden/ZmGfCCOgiFXI9ZXM/Mario%20Mania/move_twirl.gif)

**Twirl** and **use Power Ups**! [Twirl only with Mario cap. Press R in the air]


![Biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/896fe276fe82298f96d8233497a6d69e7d0de56c.png)


![Shroom Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ce893e26e9bb931af6150bc97494adda6cc47bb.png)

**Shroom Grove** is the first thing that you think about Mushroom Kingdom. There are many colorful mushrooms that can be used as wood or food. Blue mushrooms are slippery, pink ones are bouncy. You can also find Mushroom Ceramic in the caves of this biome.

![Mole Hills](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1227d484c2450cf9d3d019cf6b1e9199245a2b58_0.webp)

**Mole Hills** is pretty common and safe biome. There you can find turnips that can be thrown or eaten, bushes with tasty yoshi fruits and volcano lotuses that can release dangerous spores. Moles and Rexes spawn here. 

![Piperock Plateau](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd75223a2b026ac99ad32940dad9ba1da1539de2.png)

**Piperock Plateau** has a lot of piperock mountains towering over the ground. That's where you can find new ore called Piperite. You can craft pipes and some blocks with it. Skedaddlers and Trompettes live in this biome. King Bob-omb's mountain can be found here. 

![Goomba Woods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5d2ee168f672c2331f31280583e10397e914d8e_0.webp)

**Goomba Woods** is very beautiful biome where you can find many maple trees and many different Goombas. But all of them run away in fear when they see Maw-Maws. These insatiable amphibians aren't picky, so you need to be careful with them too. Here you can find Goomboss' tree generator that can be activated with Power Stars 

![Emerald Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76f2f66f8842e7c36bf03ca356205e31a1d3f6e3_0.webp)

**Emerald Forest** is a mysterious place where you can find many unique things: azurlia trees, skystone, ancient buildings, many vines. But this place is not safe. Munchers cover floors and ceilings, Vegies fly around and drop volcanic spores.

![Ruins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a9dfc1ed1480ed85a3c370e5a244c60353c3ee1_0.webp)

**Ruins**. Conquered, destroyed by Koopas lands of Mushroom Kingdom where cannonballs are always falling, Bill Bullets are flying and Bob-Ombs are exploding. That's where you can find Larry's Citadel.
